station.title: Student feedback layer
station.description: Student-facing root causes, recommendations, and feedback text.

metrics.adaptive_feedback:
=== ROOT CAUSES OF YOUR PERFORMANCE ===

Planning & Preparation (Priority: HIGH)
Your essay would benefit from pre-writing planning. Try: 1) Write thesis first, 2) Create outline, 3) Gather evidence, 4) Write draft, 5) Revise

Rubric Misalignment (Priority: HIGH)
Your writing doesn't align with the rubric criteria. Review the rubric carefully before each paragraph. Ask: Does this show [criterion X]?

Text Organization (Priority: MEDIUM)
Work on organizing your ideas clearly: Introduction (hook + thesis) -> Body (topic sentences + evidence) -> Conclusion (summary + reflection)

Argument Strength (Priority: MEDIUM)
Strengthen your arguments by: 1) Using credible evidence, 2) Explaining how evidence supports your claim, 3) Addressing counterarguments

Engagement & Effort (Priority: HIGH)
Increase problem engagement: 1) Open assignment early, 2) Check rubric frequently, 3) Ask questions if unclear, 4) Revise after feedback

=== FOR YOUR PROFILE (Disengaged Students - Low participation) ===
Focus on consistent effort and reflection on your writing.

=== SPECIFIC ACTIONS YOU SHOULD TAKE ===
1. RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
2. RECOMMEND_RUBRIC_REVIEW: Ensure student understanding of rubric criteria
3. RECOMMEND_STRUCTURE_TRAINING: Focus on essay structure (intro/body/conclusion)
4. RECOMMEND_EVIDENCE_BUILDING: Teach use of evidence and reasoning
5. ACTION_EARLY_INTERVENTION: Contact and encourage participation
6. ACTION_SCAFFOLDING: Provide additional support materials

=== KEY INSIGHT ===
Your main challenge is organizing thoughts before writing.

=== RULE-BASED DIAGNOSTIC FEEDBACK ===
The essay's organization requires significant improvement. Cohesion between ideas is weak.; Your argument requires stronger support with clear evidence and examples.; Insufficient revision of your work. Revision is essential for academic improvement.; أنت رأيت التعليقات لكن لم تقم بتطبيقها. يجب العمل على التحسينات.; Excellent! Seeking assistance demonstrates awareness of your learning needs and a strong commitment to improvement.
Elaboration prompt + staged drafting; Strategic feedback on structure; Higher-order feedback on support; Lexical enrichment; Metacognitive revision prompt; Feedforward explanation; Dialogic scaffolding

=== RECOMMENDED INTERVENTIONS ===
توفير قالب تنظيم الفقرات; تقديم أمثلة لفقرات منظمة جيداً; تمرين توصيل الأفكار; تدريس استراتيجية CER (Claim-Evidence-Reasoning); تدريب على تطوير الحجج; جلسة نقاش حول الأمثلة الفعالة; قائمة تحقق موجهة للمراجعة; استراتيجيات المراجعة الفعالة; ورشة عمل حول تقنيات التحرير; جلسة إعادة شرح التعليقات; خطة عمل لتطبيق التعليقات; متابعة للتأكد من التطبيق; تقديم إثراء إضافي; جلسة حوار توضيحي; تشجيع وتعزيز السلوك الإيجابي
Guided planning and idea expansion; Paragraph restructuring with model; CER scaffold and examples; Vocabulary expansion support; Guided revision checklist; Feedback decoding session; Clarification conference
recommendations: RECOMMEND_BRAINSTORM: Student should spend time planning before writing
RECOMMEND_RUBRIC_REVIEW: Ensure student understanding of rubric criteria
RECOMMEND_EVIDENCE_BUILDING: Teach use of evidence and reasoning
